resources.one_line_summary: We investigate a number of Artificial Neural Network architectures (well-known and more ``exotic'') in application to the long-term financial time-series forecasts of indexes on different global markets

resources.title: $α$-robust utility maximization with intractable claims: A quantile optimization approach
resources.one_line_summary: This paper studies an $α$-robust utility maximization problem where an investor faces an intractable claim -- an exogenous contingent claim with known marginal distribution but unspecified dependence structure with financial market returns

resources.authors_or_owners: Daniel Cunha Oliveira, Grover Guzman, Nick Firoozye
resources.one_line_summary: Robust optimization provides a principled framework for decision-making under uncertainty, with broad applications in finance, engineering, and operations research

resources.title: 151 Trading Strategies
resources.one_line_summary: 151 Trading Strategies. A 361-page PDF.

resources.authors_or_owners: Kefan Chen, Hussain Ahmad, Diksha Goel, Claudia Szabo
resources.one_line_summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have recently gained popularity in stock trading for their ability to process multimodal financial data

resources.title: A Bayesian approach to out-of-sample network reconstruction
resources.one_line_summary: Networks underpin systems that range from finance to biology, yet their structure is often only partially observed

resources.authors_or_owners: Jing Liu, Maria Grith, Xiaowen Dong, Mihai Cucuringu
resources.one_line_summary: This paper studies cross-market return predictability through a machine learning framework that preserves economic structure

resources.authors_or_owners: Luiza Ribeiro, Alexandre Street, Jose Manuel Arroyo, Rodrigo Moreno

resources.title: A Clarifying Note on Long-Horizon Investment and Dollar-Cost Averaging: An Effective Investment Exposure Perspective
resources.one_line_summary: It is widely claimed in investment education and practice that extending the investment horizon reduces risk, and that diversifying investment timing, for example through dollar-cost averaging (DCA), further mitigates investment risk

resources.title: A class of stochastic control problems with state constraints
resources.one_line_summary: We obtain a probabilistic solution to linear-quadratic optimal control problems with state constraints

resources.title: A Co-evolutionary Approach for Heston Calibration
resources.one_line_summary: We evaluate a co-evolutionary calibration framework for the Heston model in which a genetic algorithm (GA) over parameters is coupled to an evolving neural inverse map from option surfaces to parameters

resources.authors_or_owners: Abhimanyu Nag, Madhur Prabhakar, Tanuj Behl

resources.title: A Comparative Analysis of Statistical and Machine Learning Models for Outlier Detection in Bitcoin Limit Order Books
resources.one_line_summary: The detection of outliers within cryptocurrency limit order books (LOBs) is of paramount importance for comprehending market dynamics, particularly in highly volatile and nascent regulatory environments

resources.title: A comprehensive review and analysis of different modeling approaches for financial index tracking problem
resources.authors_or_owners: Vrinda Dhingra, Amita Sharma, Anubha Goel
resources.one_line_summary: Index tracking, also known as passive investing, has gained significant traction in financial markets due to its cost-effective and efficient approach to replicating the performance of a specific market index

resources.title: A Computational Framework for Financial Structures
resources.one_line_summary: Financial structures such as securitisations, insurance contracts, and other hierarchical claims systems can be interpreted as deterministic allocation mechanisms acting on stochastic inflow processes

resources.title: A continuous-time Kyle model with price-responsive traders
resources.one_line_summary: Classical Kyle-type models of informed trading typically treat noise trader demand as purely exogenous

resources.title: A Controlled Comparison of Deep Learning Architectures for Multi-Horizon Financial Forecasting: Evidence from 918 Experiments
resources.one_line_summary: Multi-horizon price forecasting is central to portfolio allocation, risk management, and algorithmic trading, yet deep learning architectures have proliferated faster than rigorous financial benchmarks can evaluate them

resources.title: A Counterfactual Diagnostic Framework for Explaining KS Deterioration in Credit Risk Model Validation
resources.one_line_summary: The Kolmogorov-Smirnov (KS) statistic is widely used in credit risk model monitoring and validation to assess discriminatory power

resources.one_line_summary: How to do financial data analysis using ChatGPT. A 54-page PDF.

resources.authors_or_owners: Marco Dessalvi, Massimo Bartoletti, Alberto Lluch-Lafuente
resources.one_line_summary: Decentralized Finance (DeFi) has revolutionized financial markets by enabling complex asset-exchange protocols without trusted intermediaries

resources.title: A Framework for Waterfall Pricing Using Simulation-Based Uncertainty Modeling
resources.authors_or_owners: Nicola Jean, Giacomo Le Pera, Lorenzo Giada, Claudio Nordio
resources.one_line_summary: We present a novel framework for pricing waterfall structures by simulating the uncertainty of the cashflow generated by the underlying assets in terms of value, time, and confidence levels

resources.title: A general framework for pricing and hedging under local viability
resources.one_line_summary: In this paper, a new approach for solving the problems of pricing and hedging derivatives is introduced in a general frictionless market setting

resources.title: A Global Optimal Theory of Portfolio beyond R-$σ$ Model
resources.one_line_summary: The deviation of the efficient market hypothesis (EMH) for the practical economic system allows us gain the arbitrary or risk premium in finance markets

resources.title: A Herding-Based Model of Technological Transfer and Economic Convergence: Evidence from Central and Eastern Europe
resources.one_line_summary: The long-run convergence of developing economies toward advanced countries exhibits robust empirical regularities, yet the mechanisms underlying technological diffusion remain insufficiently specified in standard growth models

resources.title: A High-Level Framework for Practically Model-Independent Pricing
resources.one_line_summary: We present a high-level framework that explains why, in practice, different pricing models calibrated to the same vanilla surface tend to produce similar valuations for exotic derivatives

resources.title: A Hybrid Architecture for Options Wheel Strategy Decisions: LLM-Generated Bayesian Networks for Transparent Trading
resources.one_line_summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) excel at understanding context and qualitative nuances but struggle with the rigorous and transparent reasoning required in high-stakes quantitative domains such as financial trading

resources.title: A Laplace-based perspective on conditional mean risk sharing
resources.one_line_summary: The conditional mean risk-sharing (CMRS) rule is an important tool for distributing aggregate losses across individual risks, but its implementation in continuous multivariate models typically requires complicated multidimensional integrals

resources.title: A Learnable Wavelet Transformer for Long-Short Equity Trading and Risk-Adjusted Return Optimization
resources.authors_or_owners: Shuozhe Li, Du Cheng, Leqi Liu

resources.title: A Limit Order Book Model for High Frequency Trading with Rough Volatility
resources.authors_or_owners: Yun Chen-Shue, Yukun Li, Jiongmin Yong
resources.one_line_summary: We introduce a model for limit order book of a certain security with two main features: First, both the limit orders and market orders for the given asset are allowed to appear and interact with each other

resources.title: A mathematical study of the excess growth rate
resources.one_line_summary: We study the excess growth rate -- a fundamental logarithmic functional arising in portfolio theory -- from the perspective of information theory

resources.title: A Methodology to Measure Impacts of Scenarios Through Expected Credit Losses
resources.authors_or_owners: Mahmood Alaghmandan, Meghal Arora, Olga Streltchenko
resources.one_line_summary: In this paper, we present a methodology for measuring the impact of scenarios on the expected losses of exposures by leveraging the existing provisioning infrastructure within financial institutions, where scenario effects are captured through changes in probabilities of default

resources.title: Utility-Weighted Forecasting and Calibration for Risk-Adjusted Decisions under Trading Frictions
resources.one_line_summary: Forecasting accuracy is routinely optimised in financial prediction tasks even though investment and risk-management decisions are executed under transaction costs, market impact, capacity limits, and binding risk constraints

resources.title: Valuation Model of Chinese Convertible Bonds Based on Monte Carlo Simulation
resources.one_line_summary: We tackle the problem of pricing Chinese convertible bonds(CCBs) using Monte Carlo simulation and dynamic programming

resources.title: Valuation of Exotic Options and Counterparty Games Based on Conditional Diffusion
resources.one_line_summary: This paper addresses the challenges of pricing exotic options and structured products, which traditional models often fail to handle due to their inability to capture real-world market phenomena like fat-tailed distributions and volatility clustering

resources.title: Valuation of variable annuities under the Volterra mortality and rough Heston models
resources.one_line_summary: This paper investigates the valuation of variable annuity contracts with an early surrender option under non-Markovian models

resources.title: VaR at Its Extremes: Impossibilities and Conditions for One-Sided Random Variables
resources.one_line_summary: We investigate the extremal aggregation behavior of Value-at-Risk (VaR) -- that is, its additivity properties across all probability levels -- for sums of one-sided random variables

resources.title: Variable annuities: A closer look at ratchet guarantees, hybrid contract designs, and taxation
resources.authors_or_owners: Jennifer Alonso-Garcia, Len Patrick Dominic M. Garces, Jonathan Ziveyi
resources.one_line_summary: This paper investigates optimal withdrawal strategies and behavior of policyholders in a variable annuity (VA) contract with a guaranteed minimum withdrawal benefit (GMWB) rider incorporating taxation and a ratchet mechanism for enhancing the benefit base during the life of the contract

resources.title: Variational Quantum Circuit-Based Reinforcement Learning for Dynamic Portfolio Optimization
resources.authors_or_owners: Vincent Gurgul, Ying Chen, Stefan Lessmann
resources.one_line_summary: This paper presents a Quantum Reinforcement Learning (QRL) solution to the dynamic portfolio optimization problem based on Variational Quantum Circuits

resources.title: Variational Quantum Eigensolver for Real-World Finance: Scalable Solutions for Dynamic Portfolio Optimization Problems
resources.authors_or_owners: Irene De León, Danel Arias, Manuel Martín-Cordero, María Esperanza Molina, Pablo Serrano, Senaida Hernández-Santana, Miguel Ángel Jiménez Herrera, Joana Fraxanet, Ginés Carrascal, Escolástico Sánchez, Inmaculada Posadillo, Álvaro Nodar
resources.one_line_summary: We present a scalable, hardware-aware methodology for extending the Variational Quantum Eigensolver (VQE) to large, realistic Dynamic Portfolio Optimization (DPO) problems

resources.title: Vault as a credit instrument
resources.one_line_summary: We derive five tractable credit risk metrics for DeFi lending vault depositors, grounded in a formal three level decomposition of vault risk into mechanical loss channels (Level 1), governance quality (Level 2) and smart contract code integrity (Level 3)

resources.title: VERAFI: Verified Agentic Financial Intelligence through Neurosymbolic Policy Generation
resources.one_line_summary: Financial AI systems suffer from a critical blind spot: while Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) excels at finding relevant documents, language models still generate calculation errors and regulatory violations during reasoning, even with perfect retrieval

resources.title: Visibility-Graph Asymmetry as a Structural Indicator of Volatility Clustering
resources.one_line_summary: Volatility clustering is one of the most robust stylized facts of financial markets, yet it is typically detected using moment-based diagnostics or parametric models such as GARCH

resources.title: Visualization of The Content of Surah al Fiil using Marker-Based Augmented Reality
resources.authors_or_owners: Wisnu Uriawan, Ahmad Badru Al Husaeni, Dzakwanfaiq Nauval, Farid Muhtar Fathir, Mahesa Adlan Falah, Muhammad Miftahur Rizki Awalin
resources.one_line_summary: This study presents the development of a marker-based augmented reality (AR) application designed to visualize the content of Surah al-Fil as an interactive and context-rich medium for Islamic education

resources.title: VIX and European options with jumps in the short-maturity regime
resources.authors_or_owners: Desen Guo, Dan Pirjol, Xiaoyu Wang, Lingjiong Zhu
resources.one_line_summary: We present a study of the short-maturity asymptotics for VIX and European option prices in local-stochastic volatility models with compound Poisson jumps

resources.title: VIX options in the SABR model
resources.one_line_summary: We study the pricing of VIX options in the SABR model $dS_t = σ_t S_t^βdB_t, dσ_t = ωσ_t dZ_t$ where $B_t,Z_t$ are standard Brownian motions correlated with correlation $ρ<0$ and $0 \leq β< 1$

resources.title: VOLatility Archive for Realized Estimates (VOLARE)
resources.authors_or_owners: Fabrizio Cipollini, Giulia Cruciani, Giampiero M. Gallo, Alessandra Insana, Edoardo Otranto, Fabio Spagnolo
resources.one_line_summary: VOLARE (VOLatility Archive for Realized Estimates - https://volare.unime.it) is an open research infrastructure providing standardized realized volatility and covariance measures constructed from ultra-high-frequency financial data

resources.title: Volatility time series modeling by single-qubit quantum circuit learning
resources.one_line_summary: We employ single-qubit quantum circuit learning (QCL) to model the dynamics of volatility time series

resources.title: Was Benoit Mandelbrot a hedgehog or a fox?
resources.one_line_summary: Benoit Mandelbrot's scientific legacy spans an extraordinary range of disciplines, from linguistics and fluid turbulence to cosmology and finance, suggesting the intellectual temperament of a "fox" in Isaiah Berlin's famous dichotomy of thinkers

resources.title: Wasserstein Distributionally Robust Rare-Event Simulation
resources.authors_or_owners: Dohyun Ahn, Huiyi Chen, Lewen Zheng
resources.one_line_summary: Standard rare-event simulation techniques require exact distributional specifications, which limits their effectiveness in the presence of distributional uncertainty

resources.title: Weak error approximation for rough and Gaussian mean-reverting stochastic volatility models
resources.one_line_summary: For a class of stochastic models with Gaussian and rough mean-reverting volatility that embeds the genuine rough Stein-Stein model, we study the weak approximation rate when using a Euler type scheme with integrated kernels

resources.title: Wealth or Stealth? The Camouflage Effect in Insider Trading
resources.authors_or_owners: Jin Ma, Weixuan Xia, Jianfeng Zhang
resources.one_line_summary: We consider a Kyle-type model where insider trading takes place among a potentially large population of liquidity traders and is subject to legal penalties

resources.title: Wealth Taxation as a Drift Modification: A Fokker-Planck Approach to Tax Neutrality
resources.one_line_summary: We reformulate the neutral wealth tax framework of Froeseth (2026; arXiv:2603.05264) in the language of stochastic dynamics and statistical physics

resources.title: Weighted Generalized Risk Measure and Risk Quadrangle: Characterization, Optimization and Application
resources.authors_or_owners: Yang Liu, Yunran Wei, Xintao Ye
resources.one_line_summary: Various financial market scenarios may cause heterogeneous risk assessments among analysts, which motivates the usage of the Generalized Risk Measure in Fadina et al

resources.title: What Happens When Institutional Liquidity Enters Prediction Markets: Identification, Measurement, and a Synthetic Proof of Concept
resources.one_line_summary: Prediction markets are starting to look less like crowd polls and more like electronic markets

resources.title: What's the Price of Monotonicity? A Multi-Dataset Benchmark of Monotone-Constrained Gradient Boosting for Credit PD
resources.one_line_summary: Financial institutions face a trade-off between predictive accuracy and interpretability when deploying machine learning models for credit risk

resources.title: When AI Trading Agents Compete: Adverse Selection of Meta-Orders by Reinforcement Learning-Based Market Making
resources.authors_or_owners: Ali Raza Jafree, Konark Jain, Nick Firoozye
resources.one_line_summary: We investigate the mechanisms by which medium-frequency trading agents are adversely selected by opportunistic high-frequency traders

resources.title: When Alpha Breaks: Two-Level Uncertainty for Safe Deployment of Cross-Sectional Stock Rankers
resources.one_line_summary: Cross-sectional ranking models are often deployed as if point predictions were sufficient: the model outputs scores and the portfolio follows the induced ordering

resources.title: When cooperation is beneficial to all agents
resources.authors_or_owners: Alessandro Doldi, Marco Frittelli, Marco Maggis
resources.one_line_summary: Within a general semimartingale framework, we study the relationship between collective market efficiency and individual rationality

resources.title: When defaults cannot be hedged: an actuarial approach to xVA calculations via local risk-minimization
resources.authors_or_owners: Francesca Biagini, Alessandro Gnoatto, Katharina Oberpriller
resources.one_line_summary: We consider the pricing and hedging of counterparty credit risk and funding when there is no possibility to hedge the jump to default of either the bank or the counterparty

resources.title: When Forecast Accuracy Fails: Rank Correlation and Decision Quality in Multi-Market Battery Storage Optimization
resources.one_line_summary: Battery energy storage systems (BESS) participating in multi-market electricity trading require price forecasts to optimize dispatch decisions

resources.title: When Fusion Helps and When It Breaks: View-Aligned Robustness in Same-Source Financial Imaging
resources.one_line_summary: We study same-source multi-view learning and adversarial robustness for next-day direction prediction using two deterministic, window-aligned image views derived from the same time series: an OHLCV-rendered chart (ohlcv) and a technical-indicator matrix (indic)

resources.title: When Indemnity Insurance Fails: Parametric Coverage under Binding Budget and Risk Constraints
resources.authors_or_owners: Benjamin Avanzi, Debbie Kusch Falden, Mogens Steffensen
resources.one_line_summary: In high-risk environments, traditional indemnity insurance is often unaffordable or ineffective, despite its well-known optimality under expected utility

resources.title: When Reasoning Fails: Evaluating 'Thinking' LLMs for Stock Prediction
resources.one_line_summary: Problem

resources.title: When the Rules Change: Adaptive Signal Extraction via Kalman Filtering and Markov-Switching Regimes
resources.one_line_summary: Most empirical microstructure research assumes that order flow--return parameters are constant, yet these relationships shift substantially across market regimes

resources.title: Which Voices Move Markets? Speaker Identity and the Cross-Section of Post-Earnings Returns
resources.authors_or_owners: Karmanpartap Singh Sidhu, Junyi Fan, Maryam Pishgar
resources.one_line_summary: We utilize FinBERT, a domain-specific transformer model, to parse 6.5 million sentences from 16,428 S&P 500 quarterly earnings call transcripts (2015-2025) and demonstrate that post-earnings stock returns are not equally affected by all speakers in a conference call

resources.title: Who Restores the Peg? A Mean-Field Game Approach to Model Stablecoin Market Dynamics
resources.one_line_summary: USDC and USDT are the dominant stablecoins pegged to \$1 with a total market capitalization of over \$300B and rising

resources.title: Why `Fair Market Valuations' are Inappropirate for Employee-Owned Firms and Partnerships
resources.one_line_summary: The usual formulas for the fair market valuation of a firm at time $t$ include the profits accruing to the shares at time $t$ from the use of wage or salaried labor in the future

resources.title: Why do financial prices exhibit Brownian motion despite predictable order flow?
resources.one_line_summary: In financial market microstructure, there are two enigmatic empirical laws: (i) the market-order flow has predictable persistence due to metaorder splitters by institutional investors, well formulated as the Lillo-Mike-Farmer model

resources.title: Win-score promotion gates in aggregator-routed RFQ markets: A two-tier stochastic control model
resources.one_line_summary: We study market making in aggregator-routed RFQ markets where platform routing depends on slowly varying dealer performance scores

resources.title: Wishart conditional tail risk measures: An analytic approach
resources.one_line_summary: This study introduces a new analytical framework for quantifying multivariate risk measures

resources.title: XGBoost Forecasting of NEPSE Index Log Returns with Walk Forward Validation
resources.authors_or_owners: Sahaj Raj Malla, Shreeyash Kayastha, Rumi Suwal, Harish Chandra Bhandari, Rajendra Adhikari
resources.one_line_summary: This study develops a robust machine learning framework for one-step-ahead forecasting of daily log-returns in the Nepal Stock Exchange (NEPSE) Index using the XGBoost regressor
